narrative:
Nevada (precinct in Wyandot County) has 454 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
